result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= date
LINE 9:     AND ch.createddate >= DATE '2022-04-10'
                               ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    AND ch.createddate >= DATE '2022-04-10'
    AND ch.createddate <  DATE '2023-04-11'
),
transfers AS (
  SELECT
    REGEXP_REPLACE(old_owner, '^#', '') AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL
    AND old_owner <> ''
    AND REGEXP_REPLACE(old_owner, '^#', '') ~ '^[A-Za-z0-9]{15,18}$'
  GROUP BY 1
),
handled AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    REGEXP_REPLACE(v.owner, '^#', '') AS agent_id,
    v.case_id
  FROM (
    SELECT c.id AS case_id, c.ownerid AS owner FROM "Case" c
    UNION ALL
    SELECT a.case_id, a.old_owner AS owner FROM assignments a
    UNION ALL
    SELECT a.case_id, a.new_owner AS owner FROM assignments a
  ) v
  WHERE v.owner IS NOT NULL
    AND v.owner <> ''
    AND REGEXP_REPLACE(v.owner, '^#', '') ~ '^[A-Za-z0-9]{15,18}$'
),
handled_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id)::bigint AS cases_handled
  FROM handled
  GROUP BY 1
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) > 0
)
SELECT hc.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled_counts hc
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = hc.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) ASC, hc.cases_handled DESC, hc.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    AND ch.createddate >= DATE '2022-04-10'
    AND ch.createddate <  DATE '2023-04-11'
),
transfers AS (
  SELECT
    REGEXP_REPLACE(old_owner, '^#', '') AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL
    AND old_owner <> ''
    AND REGEXP_REPLACE(old_owner, '^#', '') ~ '^[A-Za-z0-9]{15,18}$'
  GROUP BY 1
),
handled AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    REGEXP_REPLACE(v.owner, '^#', '') AS agent_id,
    v.case_id
  FROM (
    SELECT c.id AS case_id, c.ownerid AS owner FROM "Case" c
    UNION ALL
    SELECT a.case_id, a.old_owner AS owner FROM assignments a
    UNION ALL
    SELECT a.case_id, a.new_owner AS owner FROM assignments a
  ) v
  WHERE v.owner IS NOT NULL
    AND v.owner <> ''
    AND REGEXP_REPLACE(v.owner, '^#', '') ~ '^[A-Za-z0-9]{15,18}$'
),
handled_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id)::bigint AS cases_handled
  FROM handled
  GROUP BY 1
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) > 0
)
SELECT hc.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled_counts hc
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = hc.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) ASC, hc.cases_handled DESC, hc.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
WITH assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    AND ch.createddate >= DATE '2022-04-10'
    AND ch.createddate <  DATE '2023-04-11'
),
transfers AS (
  SELECT
    REGEXP_REPLACE(old_owner, '^#', '') AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL
    AND old_owner <> ''
    AND REGEXP_REPLACE(old_owner, '^#', '') ~ '^[A-Za-z0-9]{15,18}$'
  GROUP BY 1
),
handled AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    REGEXP_REPLACE(v.owner, '^#', '') AS agent_id,
    v.case_id
  FROM (
    SELECT c.id AS case_id, c.ownerid AS owner FROM "Case" c
    UNION ALL
    SELECT a.case_id, a.old_owner AS owner FROM assignments a
    UNION ALL
    SELECT a.case_id, a.new_owner AS owner FROM assignments a
  ) v
  WHERE v.owner IS NOT NULL
    AND v.owner <> ''
    AND REGEXP_REPLACE(v.owner, '^#', '') ~ '^[A-Za-z0-9]{15,18}$'
),
handled_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id)::bigint AS cases_handled
  FROM handled
  GROUP BY 1
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) > 0
)
SELECT hc.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled_counts hc
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = hc.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) ASC, hc.cases_handled DESC, hc.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    AND ch.createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2022-04-10 00:00:00'
    AND ch.createddate::timestamp <  TIMESTAMP '2023-04-11 00:00:00'
),
transfers AS (
  SELECT
    REGEXP_REPLACE(old_owner, '^#', '') AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL
    AND old_owner <> ''
    AND REGEXP_REPLACE(old_owner, '^#', '') ~ '^[A-Za-z0-9]{15,18}$'
  GROUP BY 1
),
handled AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    REGEXP_REPLACE(v.owner, '^#', '') AS agent_id,
    v.case_id
  FROM (
    SELECT c.id AS case_id, c.ownerid AS owner FROM "Case" c
    UNION ALL
    SELECT a.case_id, a.old_owner AS owner FROM assignments a
    UNION ALL
    SELECT a.case_id, a.new_owner AS owner FROM assignments a
  ) v
  WHERE v.owner IS NOT NULL
    AND v.owner <> ''
    AND REGEXP_REPLACE(v.owner, '^#', '') ~ '^[A-Za-z0-9]{15,18}$'
),
handled_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id)::bigint AS cases_handled
  FROM handled
  GROUP BY 1
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) > 0
)
SELECT hc.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled_counts hc
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = hc.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) ASC, hc.cases_handled DESC, hc.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;
